data.title: ArtPrize 2025 returns to Grand Rapids with 16 days of art, energy, and community from Sept 18 to Oct 4.
data.description: ArtPrize 2025 will be returning to Grand Rapids, Michigan from September 18 to October 4. This year's event is set to be larger in scale compared to previous years, with the city transforming into a vibrant hub of art, music, and community engagement. Over the course of 16 days, attendees can expect a diverse range of artistic displays and activities to participate in, making it an exciting opportunity for all.

data.title: AAR Corp. (NYSE: AIR) reports Q4 earnings of $1.16 per share, surpassing analyst consensus of $1.01 per share, with sales of $754.5 million, beating estimates of $695.7 million. CEO John M. Holmes optimistic about the company's progress. Read more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: AAR Corp. (NYSE: AIR) announced its fourth-quarter earnings after markets closed on Wednesday, performing better than expected. The company posted quarterly earnings of $1.16 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.01 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales were reported at $754.5 million, exceeding the estimated $695.7 million. John M. Holmes, AAR's Chairman, President, and CEO, expressed satisfaction stating, "In Fiscal Year 2025, we achieved record sales and profitability, and advanced significantly in our strategic goals." Moreover, the integration of the Product Support acquisition was mostly completed, and efforts to enhance the portfolio continued with the divestiture of certain assets. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Explore XRP cloud mining in 2025 to potentially earn significant returns, but be wary of risks surpassing benefits.
data.description: Cloud mining of XRP may become feasible by 2025, but investors should exercise caution due to the potential for risks to surpass the benefits.

data.title: Ex-employee of Pump.fun faces 7 years in prison; Solana Launchpad generates $770M revenue. Hearing awaited in U.K. from jail.
data.description: Former Pump.fun employee Jarett Dunn is currently in prison in the United Kingdom, awaiting a hearing where he could potentially face a minimum of seven years behind bars.

data.title: CoVet establishes Specialty Advisory Board to advance Veterinary AI, leading in clinical support.
data.description: In a recent announcement on July 17, 2025, CoVet, a top player in veterinary artificial intelligence, has broadened its clinical expertise by establishing a Specialty Advisory Board. The company, based in San Francisco, specializes in AI-driven clinical support for veterinary professionals and is delighted to introduce its inaugural Specialty Advisory Board as part of its expanding initiatives.

data.title: Bitcoin's 4-year cycle is considered obsolete by researcher Viktor, noting market changes influenced by macroeconomic conditions.
data.description: The traditional 4-year halving cycle in the crypto market is being called into question by experts as the landscape undergoes significant changes. According to a pseudonymous crypto researcher named Viktor, the commonly accepted cycle, driven by Bitcoin's halving schedule and previous altcoin surges, is now deemed obsolete. Investors who were expecting a surge in altcoins similar to that of 2021 in early 2025 have instead seen a continuous decline in altcoin/BTC ratios. Viktor asserts that macroeconomic factors play a more dominant role in shaping the crypto market currently. Rather than following a predetermined pattern, market movements now correlate closely with broader risk-on or risk-off sentiments. This evolving trend indicates a new era where understanding broader economic conditions is essential for investors' success in the crypto sphere. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CCK Law hosts webinar in San Antonio to assist Texas veterans in navigating VA disability claims, on July 17, 2025.
data.description: Legal experts from the San Antonio office recently conducted a webinar on July 17, 2025, to provide crucial guidance for veterans looking to access benefits. Chisholm Chisholm & Kilpatrick (CCK Law), a prominent veterans disability law firm, organized this session to assist veterans. The webinar was free of charge and aimed to equip attendees with valuable information.

data.title: Prepare for new CMS glycemic measures with Glytec's FDA-cleared technology. 167 days left till federal reporting kicks in.
data.description: With only 167 days left to comply with the upcoming federal reporting guidelines concerning hypo- and hyperglycemia, Glytec, a prominent provider of AI-driven technology solutions for diabetes and associated ailments, is taking the lead. Known for its FDA-approved Glucommander® EHR-integrated platform, Glytec is gearing up to assist healthcare providers in meeting these new requirements efficiently. The deadline for implementation is fast approaching, providing organizations with a limited window to ensure they are prepared for the changes ahead.

data.title: New report shows a 2 million-unit housing shortage across US neighborhoods, revealing deficits in middle-income areas.
data.description: Recent data reveals that there is a shortage of two million housing units at a national level. This shortage highlights underlying deficits in middle-income communities while indicating surpluses in wealthier areas. The information was released by PolicyMap, a prominent geospatial data platform, in collaboration with Moody's Analytics. This disparity was brought to light in Philadelphia and signifies a concerning trend in housing distribution.
